title: Instruction layer + knowledge: every surface teaches the verbs, none the hand-edit
action: Per CONTEXT v2 D6 (+ plan-check P1-1, P2-4, P3-7). Reword every surface that teaches hand-editing the PBI table to the CLI verbs: scribing D8 append => backlog pbi add, close-flip => pbi status --to done (partial delivery => amend with Delivered/Remaining in cos); qualifying D13 => pbi status --to parked; exploring D11a => pbi status --to in-flight --feature <slug> (pbi add first when no row); grooming drift audit => pbi list --json; herding: §6(b) Status interlock AND §6(a) feature-slug read AND §7 highest-impact prose read all move to pbi list --json (fold carries title+cos text), and its stale documented schema (| ID | PBI | Status | Ghi chú |) is corrected. skills/bee-herding/scripts/classify-lane.mjs: retarget parseRow/findRow to the fold (spawn bee backlog pbi list --json or read via lib), STATUS_VALUES => 5-value enum; its render mirrors regen via the normal skill-sync. scribing-reference 'two backlogs, two owners' section rewritten to the ONE-store model (pbi events + friction events in one stream; docs/backlog.md = generated view). AGENTS.block.md + root AGENTS.md working-files lines byte-parallel ('docs/backlog.md <- GENERATED view of .bee/backlog.jsonl pbi events; edit via bee backlog pbi/render'). Author/update the knowledge concept for the unified backlog store (follow the bundle authoring template; bee knowledge index; knowledge check green). Grep-proof: zero non-archive surfaces instruct hand-editing docs/backlog.md. Mirrors + manifest + registry regen.

truths: grep-proof: no surface teaches the hand-edit
classify-lane reads the fold; 5-value enum; herding schema fixed

verify: node scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check

trace.outcome: instruction layer migrated: scribing/qualifying/exploring/grooming/herding + classify-lane.mjs teach the pbi verbs (5-value enum, fold reads); AGENTS twins updated; two-store prose gone (grep 3->0); knowledge concept backlog-store.md authored; mirrors+manifest+knowledge green
trace.verify_command: node scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check
